items.title: Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL加入快速建立模式，數秒即可開通無伺服器資料庫
items.summary: AWS宣布Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL正式支援快速建立模式（Express Configuration），開發者只需在主控臺透過點擊，或執行單一CLI指令，即可在數秒內開通一個可用的無伺服器PostgreSQL資料庫，且不需要設定Amazon VPC網路環境即可對外連線。該功能目前已在所有AWS商業區域正式上線。

items.title: Maintainer: tighten PR workflow script
items.summary: Maintainer: tighten PR workflow script Reduce prep and merge friction in the PR wrapper by keeping rebases explicit, reusing doc-only gate results, and making review output terminal-first. Also add clearer baseline-noise guidance for unrelated local gate failures plus worktree listing and cleanup helpers.
